name: Diagnostics.ActivityId
description: Returns an opaque identifier for the currently-running evaluation.

name: Diagnostics.CorrelationId
description: Returns an opaque identifier to correlate incoming requests with outgoing ones.

name: Diagnostics.Trace
signature: Diagnostics.Trace( traceLevel as number, message as anynonnull, value as any, optional delayed as nullable logical ) as any
description: Writes a trace `message`, if tracing is enabled, and returns `value`. An optional parameter `delayed` specifies whether to delay the evaluation of `value` until the message is traced. `traceLevel` can take one of the following values: * [`TraceLevel.Critical`](tracelevel-type.md) * [`TraceLevel.Error`](tracelevel-type.md) * [`TraceLevel.Warning`](tracelevel-type.md) * [`TraceLevel.Information`](tracelevel-type.md) * [`TraceLevel.Verbose`](tracelevel-type.md)
